name: freelancers using Upwork processing 5–15 timesheets/week tool
description: For freelancers using Upwork processing 5–15 timesheets/week, inconsistent tracking causes payment delays. We provide a timesheet consolidation app instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inconsistent tracking of hours worked across multiple clients
